title: Caesar Cipher Encryption Process
description: A visual walkthrough of the Caesar cipher showing the substitution concept, encryption and decryption formulas C=(P+K) mod 26 and P=(C-K) mod 26, a worked example with K=3, and its vulnerabilities to brute-force and frequency analysis.

nodes.label: Plaintext: A B C D E ... Z
Ciphertext: D E F G H ... C
